requirement_topic.en: Radio / Telecom Terminal Equipment — TRR Type Approval
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电/电信终端设备 — TRR型号认证
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電/電信終端設備 — TRR型號認證

summary.en: Fiji requires mandatory type approval from the Telecommunications Regulatory Authority (TRR, formerly the Telecommunications Authority of Fiji) for radio transmitting equipment and telecom terminal equipment intended for connection to public networks or operation in Fiji. Applicants must submit a technical file and supporting test reports. AS/NZS test reports (for example AS/NZS 4268 for Wi-Fi equipment) may be accepted as a technical basis for TRR approval. CE, FCC, and CCC marks and approvals are not recognised and do not satisfy TRR requirements. The TRR type approval is ordinarily held by the local Fiji authorised importer or agent.
summary.zh: 斐济要求对在斐济境内连接公共网络或运行的无线电发射设备及电信终端设备，须取得电信监管局（TRR，原斐济电信管理局）的强制型号认证。申请人须提交技术文件及支持性测试报告。AS/NZS测试报告（如Wi-Fi设备适用的AS/NZS 4268）可作为TRR认证的技术依据。CE、FCC及CCC标志及认证不被认可，不能满足TRR要求。TRR型号认证通常由斐济本地授权进口商或代理持有。
summary.zht: 斐濟要求對在斐濟境內連接公共網絡或運行的無線電發射設備及電信終端設備，須取得電信監管局（TRR，原斐濟電信管理局）的強制型號認證。申請人須提交技術文件及支持性測試報告。AS/NZS測試報告（如Wi-Fi設備適用的AS/NZS 4268）可作為TRR認證的技術依據。CE、FCC及CCC標誌及認證不被認可，不能滿足TRR要求。TRR型號認證通常由斐濟本地授權進口商或代理持有。

standards_or_laws: Telecommunications Decree 2008 (Fiji) — enabling legislation for TRR licensing and type approval
TRR Type Approval Framework — mandatory for radio and telecom terminal equipment operated or connected to public networks in Fiji
AS/NZS 4268 — Wi-Fi equipment standard (may be accepted as technical evidence for TRR approval)

summary.en: In China, radio transmitting equipment requires SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval issued by MIIT. Telecom terminal equipment requires a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). Technical conformance is demonstrated against GB radio and telecom product standards. These approvals are mandatory domestic Chinese requirements and are not transferable to or recognised by TRR.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线电发射设备须取得MIIT颁发的SRRC（中国国家无线电管理机构）型号认证。电信终端设备须取得MIIT网络准入许可（NAL）。技术合规须依据GB无线电及电信产品标准进行验证。上述认证均为中国境内强制要求，不可转移至斐济或被TRR认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線電發射設備須取得MIIT頒發的SRRC（中國國家無線電管理機構）型號認證。電信終端設備須取得MIIT網絡准入許可（NAL）。技術合規須依據GB無線電及電信產品標準進行驗證。上述認證均為中國境內強制要求，不可轉移至斐濟或被TRR認可。

standards_or_laws: SRRC — State Radio Regulation of China type approval for radio transmitters (MIIT)
MIIT NAL — Network Access License for telecom terminal equipment
GB 15629.11 — Chinese standard for 2.4 GHz WLAN equipment (Wi-Fi)
GB 15629.21 — Chinese standard for Bluetooth equipment

gap.en: SRRC type approval and MIIT NAL are not recognised by TRR. A separate TRR type approval application must be made for each product model intended for Fiji. AS/NZS test reports may be submitted in support of TRR approval, but they do not replace TRR's own evaluation process. CE and FCC test data may also be submitted for reference but are not directly accepted. The TRR approval must be obtained before the product is supplied, connected, or operated in Fiji.
gap.zh: SRRC型号认证及MIIT NAL不被TRR认可。每款拟在斐济销售的产品型号须单独申请TRR型号认证。AS/NZS测试报告可作为TRR认证的支持材料提交，但不能替代TRR自身的评估程序。CE及FCC测试数据也可作为参考材料提交，但不被直接接受。产品在斐济供应、接入或运行前，必须先取得TRR认证。
gap.zht: SRRC型號認證及MIIT NAL不被TRR認可。每款擬在斐濟銷售的產品型號須單獨申請TRR型號認證。AS/NZS測試報告可作為TRR認證的支持材料提交，但不能替代TRR自身的評估程序。CE及FCC測試數據也可作為參考材料提交，但不被直接接受。產品在斐濟供應、接入或運行前，必須先取得TRR認證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — TRR type approval required before supply, connection to public networks, or operation of radio and telecom terminal equipment in Fiji
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC type approval and MIIT NAL required for radio transmitters and telecom terminal equipment in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese SRRC and MIIT NAL approvals are not recognised by TRR Fiji. A separate Fiji TRR type approval application is required for each radio or telecom terminal equipment model. AS/NZS test reports may support the application but do not replace TRR evaluation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国SRRC及MIIT NAL认证不被斐济TRR认可。每款无线电或电信终端设备型号须单独申请斐济TRR型号认证。AS/NZS测试报告可作为申请支持材料，但不能替代TRR评估程序。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國SRRC及MIIT NAL認證不被斐濟TRR認可。每款無線電或電信終端設備型號須單獨申請斐濟TRR型號認證。AS/NZS測試報告可作為申請支持材料，但不能替代TRR評估程序。
